shelfmark: PUL Islamic Manuscripts, Third Series no. 584e.14 (Michaelides 14)
description: Receipt of payment (iqrār) in monies minted in copper, owed to ʻAlāʾ al-Dīn, dated 24 Ramaḍān 815 H. [1412]. [Described on the paper wrapper as: "reconnaissance du debiteur al Maalim ibn Aly ibn Omar el Kassida de payer sa dette au prince Al el Dine ibn Mar[--]oum el Farsi Shahine ibn Abdalla el Shahani" ; [next line] : "A.H. 510"].
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-15. מוחזק בPUL.
